'''鈭歞-v-dh-ch''' ('''kadavdhechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrocoagulate|electrocoagulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrocoagulate|electrocoagulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-v-dh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kadavdhechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidavdhechoko|thidavdhechoko]] || [[word:jidavdhechoko|jidavdhechoko]] || [[word:shidavdhechoko|shidavdhechoko]] || [[word:kidavdhechoko|kidavdhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudavdhechoko|thuthudavdhechoko]] || [[word:jujudavdhechoko|jujudavdhechoko]] || [[word:shushudavdhechoko|shushudavdhechoko]] || [[word:kukudavdhechoko|kukudavdhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudavdhechoko|thudavdhechoko]] || [[word:judavdhechoko|judavdhechoko]] || [[word:shudavdhechoko|shudavdhechoko]] || [[word:kudavdhechoko|kudavdhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudavdhechoko|thudavdhechoko]] || [[word:judavdhechoko|judavdhechoko]] || [[word:shudavdhechoko|shudavdhechoko]] || [[word:kudavdhechoko|kudavdhechoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodavdhechoko|thodavdhechoko]] || [[word:jodavdhechoko|jodavdhechoko]] || [[word:shodavdhechoko|shodavdhechoko]] || [[word:kodavdhechoko|kodavdhechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodavdhechoko|thodavdhechoko]] || [[word:jodavdhechoko|jodavdhechoko]] || [[word:shodavdhechoko|shodavdhechoko]] || [[word:kodavdhechoko|kodavdhechoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:davdhechoko|davdhechoko]] || [[word:davdhechoko|davdhechoko]] || [[word:davdhechoko|davdhechoko]] || [[word:davdhechoko|davdhechoko]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:davdhechoko|davdhechoko]] || [[word:davdhechoko|davdhechoko]] || [[word:davdhechoko|davdhechoko]] || [[word:davdhechoko|davdhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙davdhechoko|th忙davdhechoko]] || [[word:j忙davdhechoko|j忙davdhechoko]] || [[word:sh忙davdhechoko|sh忙davdhechoko]] || [[word:k忙davdhechoko|k忙davdhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadavdhechoko|thathadavdhechoko]] || [[word:jajadavdhechoko|jajadavdhechoko]] || [[word:shashadavdhechoko|shashadavdhechoko]] || [[word:kakadavdhechoko|kakadavdhechoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadavdhechithi|shadavdhechithi]] || [[word:shadavdhechiji|shadavdhechiji]] || [[word:shadavdhechishi|shadavdhechishi]] || [[word:shadavdhechiki|shadavdhechiki]]
